localizations.title: Día de los Muertos
localizations.hiddenObject_2: The owls on the city's rooftops are probably hiding something.
localizations.hiddenObject_3: The gaps between the books on the bookcase probably contain some of Vargas' secrets.
localizations.hint_1: You can identify the crystal La Lechuza is missing by examining her case.
localizations.hint_12: The curses are listed in Abuela's grimoire.
localizations.hint_16: Unless you can prove you are not thieves by showing her your connection with the owl goddess, La Lechuza will turn you into owls yourselves!
localizations.hint_18_first: There are glowing marks at the base of Mee-shee-ki's effigy.
localizations.hint_18: Stand Mee-shee-kee's effigy vertically in the center of the circle.
localizations.hint_24: Mee-shee-ki can help you see better in the attic.
localizations.hint_28: You'll need a special glue to fix the bone.
localizations.hint_29_first: Wearing your makeup, you look just like the rest of the dead!
localizations.hint_29: You'll need water to remove your makeup.
localizations.hint_34: Now that everything is in place, ask Abuela to begin the summoning ritual.
localizations.hint_35: If the way into the cellar is hidden, it must be where he is hiding the talisman.
localizations.hint_36: Hector doesn't care much for gold. However, his gondola is decorated abundantly with flowers.
localizations.hint_4_first: Your blowgun is empty right now. However, one of the items in La Lechuza's case should serve as ammunition.
localizations.hint_4: You need to take the thorns and load one into your blowgun, and then blow it at the creature.
localizations.hint_41_first: The chest has four locks, just like the four symbols on the stone tablet.
localizations.hint_41: The symbols on the stone tablet resemble the arrangment of some of the books on the bookcase.
localizations.hint_42: Your younger sister and brother chose their makeup based on their outfit.
localizations.hint_50_first: Your ancestors are here. All that's left to do is to place the candles as required by the ritual.
localizations.hint_50: Place one candle for each ancestor named in Albuela's grimoire.
localizations.hint_57: The glasspecker's strong beak can break anything, no matter how strong.
localizations.hint_59_first: Each room's label bears a letter marked with a dot.
localizations.hint_59: To get to the cellar, you must press the buttons in a specific sequence.
localizations.hint_6_first: You'll need to remove the glasspecker's talons from the chains.
localizations.hint_6: One of the potions in La Lechuza's case can help you free the glasspecker.
localizations.hint_60: Now that the bone has been mended, it might be of great trade value to someone.
localizations.hint_62_first: If the water rises enough, new things might reveal themselves.
localizations.hint_62: When the water reaches a particular height, it will reveal a certain number and a symbol.
localizations.hint_63: If you want one of the crystals, you will need to give the skeleton a bone to replace the one he is missing.
localizations.hint_69: You can find a replica of this drum elsewhere. Strike it 3 times.
localizations.hint_7: The marks on the bridge show that the level of the river flowing under it was not always at this height.
localizations.hint_70: Abuela specified "to the last grain" in her grimoire, so be sure to pour out the entire contents.
localizations.hint_76_first: Ask Mee-shee-ki to show you the door's secret.
localizations.hint_76: The symbol on the door resembles that of the Penalty button.
localizations.hint_77: The dart in the blowgun could put anyone to sleep!
localizations.hint_86: The owls are in the service of La Lechuza; they must know where she is hiding!
localizations.hint_87: This crystal seems to be emitting a magical light.
localizations.hint_100: To get to the graveyard, piece together the cards you have discarded that depict petals on their backs.
localizations.hint_17_first: To find the right magic circle for the counter-curse, you must first determine exactly which curse Vargas has cast on your family.
localizations.hint_17: Use Abuela's grimoire to find the correct counter-curse.
localizations.hint_67_first: Your younger brother and sister have matched their makeup to their outfit. Do the same.
localizations.hint_67: You can find the shoes being worn by your younger sister and brother in the bedroom.
localizations.hint_33_first: The arrangement of colored dots seem to resemble a date.
localizations.hint_33: You can find Vargas' birth and death dates on his grave in the graveyard. Abuela's grimoire will tell you how old he was when he died.
localizations.hint_machine_57_first: The skulls on the chest are the same color as the gems seen on Vargas' bookcase.
localizations.hint_machine_57: The engravings on the stone tablet resemble the arrangment of certain books on the bookcase.
localizations.hint_machine_88_first: As part of the clairvoyance ritual, you must indicate that you are looking for Vargas.
localizations.hint_machine_88: Abuela drew the symbols needed for the ritual in her grimoire.
localizations.answer_hint_12: Call upon Mee-shee-ki's protective spirit (37) and use it to aim at Vargas' eye (12).
localizations.answer_hint_16: The blowgun (15) is adorned with La Lechuza's feathers (16); show it to her before she turns you into owls! (15) + (16) = 31
localizations.answer_hint_18: You stand Mee-shee-ki's effigy (18) in the center of the circle (94)&(95) in such a way as to reveal two numbers.
localizations.answer_hint_24: Access machine 37, place your device over card 24, then slide the viewfinder on the book, blowpipe, and jug.
localizations.answer_hint_29: You (91) remove your makeup using the water in the puddle in front of the gate to the Land of the Dead (+2). 91 + 2 = 93.
localizations.answer_hint_34: You ask your Abuela (3) to begin the summoning ritual (34). 3 + 34 = 37
localizations.answer_hint_36: You offer Hector the flower (49), who accepts it as payment. 49 + 36 = 85
localizations.answer_hint_4: You load one of the Beddybye thorns (+62) from La Lechuza's case (75) into the blowgun (15). 15 + 62 = 77.  You then blow the dart at the creature. 77 + 4 = 81
localizations.answer_hint_41: By comparing the symbols on the stone tablet (41) with the arrangment of the books on the bookcase (53), you can determine the code to open the chest (57): CYAN, PINK, RED, BLUE.
localizations.answer_hint_50: You place one candle (2) in front of each grave belonging to your 10 ancestors (50).
localizations.answer_hint_57: You ask the glasspecker (+31) to shatter the glass bell (10) and retrieve the stone tablet.
localizations.answer_hint_59: To descend to the cellar depicted on the blueprint (35), connect the buttons corresponding to the letters marked with a dot to spell the word CELLAR. The imaginary line thus drawn forms the number 6.
localizations.answer_hint_6: You give the Smol potion (+51) to the glasspecker (6), causing it to suddenly shrink. 51 + 6 = 57
localizations.answer_hint_60: You give the bone (60) to the merchant (63) in exchange for a blue crystal (+27). 60 + 27 = 87
localizations.answer_hint_62: The rain causes the water level under the bridge (7) to rise until the entrance to Vargas' hideout is revealed. You can access machine 33.
localizations.answer_hint_69: You strike the drum displayed on your device screen 3 times, causing a silhouette to appear in the tunnel.
localizations.answer_hint_70: You flip the jug of salt (9) completely over, causing it to be a 6, and pour the contents on your ancestors' graves (70). 6 + 70 = 76
localizations.answer_hint_76: Access machine 37 and place your device over card 76. Press the Penalty button. Once the time has expired, the gate to the Land of the Dead opens (+6), allowing you (91) to pass through it. 6 + 91 = 97
localizations.answer_hint_86: The owls guide you to their mistress by forming a 16.
localizations.answer_hint_87: You give the blue crystal (87) to La Lechuza (1) so that she can begin the clairvoyance ritual. 87 + 1 = 88
localizations.answer_hint_11: Connect the symbols with their pairs without crossing their forces. Use the pink dots to reproduce the shape engraved on Abuela's medallion and connect the rest.
localizations.answer_hint_17: The fourth counter-curse in the grimoire is the good one. Press the right buttons at the same time to reproduce this circle.
localizations.answer_hint_33: Purple / Orange /Blue / Green / Yellow / Green / Green / Green
localizations.answer_hint_machine_57: Each of the etchings on the stone tablet corresponds to an arrangment of books on the bookcase, ane each arrangment has a colored gem next to it. You need to reproduce the following sequence on the chest: CYAN, PURPLE, RED, BLUE.
localizations.answer_hint_machine_88: Light up the ritualistic symbols to spell VARGAS. Using Abuela's grimoire, you can determine which symbol corresponds to each letter, as follows: MASK / DONKEY / SERPENT / TORTOISE / DONKEY / BIRD.
localizations.machine_11: The grimoire flips open! Take the booklet from the game box. You can now read it.
localizations.machine_57: You have entered the correct combination. The chest opens!
localizations.machine_17:
The curse has been lifted! Thanks to you, Vargas' vile plan has been thwarted. Everything is back to normal, and you can now celebrate the Day of the Dead with your loved ones in peace.

Congratulations!
localizations.machine_88: You spell VARGAS by lighting up the ritualistic symbols, and a vision opens up to you.
localizations.machine_67:
Children!
Something awful has happened!
Someone has stolen our talisman and cast a curse on the family!
Come into the living room!
localizations.vargas_attack: As you gaze upon the talisman you have just recovered, you see a shadow suddenly creep along the floor from behind you. You turn around…
localizations.scan_card_12: Blinded, Vargas collapses. You take the opportunity to flee. Chased by the demon, you hop onto a gondola and make your way back to the gateway to the Land of the Dead, out of breath.
localizations.scan_card_24_cruche: Here's something that could come in handy!
localizations.scan_card_24_sarbacane: A weapon can always turn out to be useful!
localizations.event_drum: You hear a happy whistling tune coming from the back of the cave. You see a gondola slowly making its way toward you.
localizations.machine_11_early: Before you open the grimoire, you should finish exploring the attic for useful items.
localizations.machine_33_intro: Thanks to the ritual and the vision it provided you, you have determined where Vargas' hideout is.
localizations.dead_world_entrance: The gate to the Land of the Dead opens before you. You hear a macabre voice telling you: "Your time is up. Welcome to the Land of the Dead!"
